head.title: Custom Care & Coverage Just For You | Kaiser Permanente

meta.name: description
meta.content: Staying healthy is easier with the right support. Visit kp.org to learn how we customize care and coverage just for you.

div.p: May is Mental Health Awareness Month. Prioritize your mental well-being with self-care resources like apps, online programs, and videos.

div.p: Browse our top-notch doctors and world-class facilities, including hours of operation and accessibility information.
Browse our top-notch doctors and world-class facilities, including hours of operation and accessibility information.
Explore a wide range of apps, podcasts, articles, and resources to help you thrive in mind, body, and spirit.
Get high-quality care that helps protect your heart health, including prevention programs, advanced treatments, and recovery resources.

a.data-analytics-click: More resources:Mental health during and after pregnancy
a.div: Mental health during and after pregnancy

div.p: Pregnancy and postpartum can be full of ups and downs. If you feel sad, worried, or overwhelmed, we’re here to support you with a range of mental health resources.

a.data-analytics-click: More resources:Build healthy habits with Headspace

div.p: Download the Headspace app to access emotional support coaching and self-care activities for mental well-being — at no extra cost.

a.data-analytics-click: More resources:Join our Advancing Cancer Care webinar

a.div: Join our Advancing Cancer Care webinar

div.p: Learn from Kaiser Permanente doctors about the latest in cancer treatment and research at our no-cost webinar.

div.h3: Health conditions from A to Z

div.p: At Kaiser Permanente, everything works together for one very important cause. You.

div.aria-label: Multiple healthcare providers attending a patient

lottie-player.data-image-altText: Abstract illustration of a doctor, an active woman, and healthy foods

div.p: Our doctors, hospitals, and health plans are all connected — collaborating seamlessly across specialties so you can stay at your best.

div.aria-label: Patient exchanging health information with healthcare providers on smart device

lottie-player.data-image-altText: A man’s profile and message blurbs indicating communication

div.p: You get convenient access to care that fits your life. Talk to a health care professional from anywhere — by phone,* email, or video.*
*When appropriate and available.

div.aria-label: Leisure activities like bicycling, mediations and mindfulness

lottie-player.data-image-altText: An abstract illustration of a couple being held in the palm of a hand, indicating they are cared for.

div.p: With a focus on preventive care, our health and wellness resources help you — and your community — thrive in mind, body, and spirit.
Our flexible individual and family plans have you covered.
